message:
test(conformance): add startup_ops fixture test (milestone: 100 tests)

Add fixture-based conformance test for FrankenLibC startup operations
(16 cases) covering __frankenlibc_startup_phase0, __frankenlibc_startup_snapshot,
and __libc_start_main functions.

Test count: 99 → 100 passing. Milestone reached!

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
